title: Federal Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Federal Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Federal Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!
